description: Anima (Cosmos-Predict2 + Qwen3) STYLE LoRA — tdrussell Greg-Rutkowski pattern. Caption begins with @style anchor + quality prefix; rest is natural-language scene description. Use this when training a style LoRA (artist look, screencap aesthetic, painterly aesthetic, etc.) on Anima.

variables.name: style_name
variables.prompt: Style anchor (será prefixado com @, ex: 'greg rutkowski' vira '@greg rutkowski.', ou 'anime screencap style')

variables.name: use_at_prefix
variables.prompt: Adicionar '@' no início do trigger? (yes para artistas, no para estilos genéricos como 'anime screencap style')
